projects.name: Win95 & Blackberry Themed Portfolio Website
projects.description: A Blazor WebAssembly personal portfolio site with two interactive UIs: a retro Windows 95–style desktop for desktop browsers and a BlackBerry-style phone for mobile. Everything — copy, links, resume, projects, colors, OS names — is driven by JSON config files so the project is easy to fork and repurpose.

projects.name: Win95 & Blackberry Themed Portfolio Website Builder
projects.description: A Windows desktop app for managing the content of your Windows 95 / BlackBerry–themed personal website. Point it at the repo folder and edit your bio, about, contact, projects, and full resume through simple forms — it reads and writes the site's JSON data files directly, copies in images and videos, and lets you tweak the Win95 desktop branding (OS name, app names, wallpaper, videos, donate link) without ever touching code.
